This PR updates MistralDetector to recognize and parse an additional “legacy compact” tool-call syntax emitted by some templates/models:

Legacy (already supported): [TOOL_CALLS] [{"name": "...", "arguments": {...}}]

The select_router_for_request function in RouterManager was identified as a performance bottleneck in the request routing hot path. Previously, it called worker_registry.get_all() for every incoming request. This method clones the atomic reference (Arc) for every worker in the registry an

Summary

Clamp wait_secs to non-negative value using .max(0.0) before passing to Duration::from_secs_f64()
Prevents panic when tokens_needed becomes negative due to concurrent token refills

Test plan

Existing unit tests pass
The fix is defensive; prevents edge case panic in concurrent scenarios

vllm.author: hmellor
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Transfor ers v5 uses httpx to access the Hugging Face Hub. When its logger is set to INFO, the logging output is quite verbose.
This PR sets httpx's logging level to WARNING when vLLM's logging level is default (INFO) so that:

The default log level is less spammy
When users specify non-default logg

vllm.title: [Docs][CPU Backend] Add nightly and per revision pre-built Arm CPU wheels
vllm.author: ioghiban
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
vLLM CI now builds AArch64 wheels for specific revisions (pushed to  https://wheels.vllm.ai/${VLLM_COMMIT}/cpu/vllm, for example https://wheels.vllm.ai/d017bceb08eaac7bae2c499124ece737fb4fb22b/cpu/vllm) and nightly builds (pushed to https://wheels.vllm.ai/nightly/cpu/vllm). This patch adds d

vllm.title: Give pooling examples better names
vllm.author: hmellor
vllm.bodyExcerpt: The names are kind of confusing. i.e. the online reranking doesn't really have anything to do with Jina, so it shouldn't be named as such.

vllm.title: [CI] refine more logic when generating and using nightly wheels & indices, add cuda130 build for aarch64, specify correct manylinux version
vllm.author: Harry-Chen
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
This PR further fixes some corner cases when generating and using nightly wheels / indices, including:

Automatic retry & friendly error messages in python-only installation test script
Exclusion of non-release wheels in a release wheel index.

It also:

enable cuda130 build on aarch64 for u

vllm.title: [IMPROVEMENT] Change MistralReasoningParser behavior
vllm.author: juliendenize
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
Fix #30139
MistralReasoningParser took advantage of Deepseek's v1 implementation which means that initially we forced several misgenerated traces to fall into the reasoning content:

if there are no begin or end think tokens generated it falls into reasoning.
if there is one end think tokens

vllm.title: Add Eagle and Eagle3 support to Transformers modeling backend
vllm.author: hmellor
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Adds Eagle and Eagle3 support to all Transformers modeling backend classes by adding suport to Base.
Depends on:

 huggingface/transformers#42747

vllm.title: [Feature] AWQ marlin quantization support for fused moe with lora
vllm.author: princepride
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
Solve issue #29424
This PR implements support for LoRA (Low-Rank Adaptation) on AWQ-quantized Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) models using the Marlin backend. Previously, enabling LoRA on AWQ MoE models was not supported and would fail during initialization.
Key changes:

vllm/model_executor/layers

vllm.author: AndreasKaratzas

Adds MLACommonMetadata to the allowed attention types for ROCm in the EAGLE speculative decoding proposer.
Problem

vllm.title: Standardise `get_rope` to use `rope_parameters["partial_rotary_factor"]`, not `rotary_dim`
vllm.author: hmellor
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Implements #30349 (comment).
Globally applies the fix from #30384.

rotary_dim as a config field only exists in GPT-J and a few custom models (Minimax for example). The Transformers library has standardised on partial_rotary_factor which lives in rope_parameters.
This PR removes the rotary_dim argum

vllm.title: [Core] Whisper Enable Encoder Batching
vllm.author: NickLucche
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR addresses an important performance limitation of our current Whisper implementation, that is the encoder is only running one request at a time, instead of scheduling multiple audios and batching them in a single (encoder) forward.
This is particularly bad at high-memory/high request rates de

vllm.title: [Perf] Optimize deepgemm experts initialization, 3.9% TTFT improvement
vllm.author: yewentao256
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
Thanks for the context from @youkaichao !
Co-author: @li-jinpeng
DeepGEMM uses negative values in m_indices (here expert_ids) to mark completely invalid / padded blocks that should be skipped. We always initialize expert_ids to -1 so any row that is not explicitly written by the scatter kern

This PR corrects the addition for 28328 by removing the new block to build vLLM variables and instead just adds the node ip address to the ray start command. This fixes any issues when a device has multiple interfaces.
Use case: Device has ethernet & QSFP cabling and we want ray to serve ove

vllm.title: [CI/Build][AMD] Skip tests in test_fusions_e2e and test_dbo_dp_ep_gsm8k that require non-existing imports for ROCm
vllm.author: rasmith
vllm.bodyExcerpt: The test test_fusions_e2e.py::test_attn_quant is unable to run if inductor_graph_partition is True since the ROCm installation of pytorch 2.9 does NOT have torch._inductor.utils.CUDAGraphWrapperMetadata.  I checked in dist-packages and confirmed that the class was not available in our installation.

vllm.author: AndreasKaratzas
vllm.bodyExcerpt: Updates the V1 e2e + engine test job to use mi325_4 agent pool instead of mi325_1 to ensure sufficient GPUs are available for multi-GPU tests.

vllm.title: gptq marlin quantization support for fused moe with lora
vllm.author: Bhanu068
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
#29424
This PR implements GPTQ support for MoE models with LoRA.
Previously, enabling LoRA on GPTQ-quantized MoE models would fail because GPTQMarlinMoEMethod did not explicitly support the modular GEMM interface required for LoRA. This PR enables the modular kernel path for GPTQ MoE when Lo

vllm.title: [CI/Build] Use spawn subprocess for ROCm

vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
This PR fixes the examples/offline_inference/data_parallel.py for the ROCm backend. ROCm needs to use spawn instead of fork for subprocesses in order to prevent a torch reinitialization error.

This PR adds GPU availability checks to the speculative decoding tests to skip multi-GPU tests on ROCm when the required number of GPUs is not available.
Changes:

Add skip logic to test_eagle_correctness for multi-GPU tests (tp_size > 1)
Add skip logic to test_mtp_correctness for multi-GPU tests (t

vllm.title: [compile] Parse compile range cache keys as Range during cache loading.
vllm.author: zhxchen17
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Today we serialize compile range indices in cache like:
((start, end), graph_index, compiler_name)

This cause cache lookup fail because the lookup keys look like:
(Range(start, end), graph_index, compiler_name)

So to fix this issue, we need to parse these dict keys into
the original form (with Ran

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Multiple fixes for gpt-oss Chat Completion prompting
vllm.author: bbrowning
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
This fixes multiple issues with how we were prompting gpt-oss models for Chat Completion requests. A summary of the fixes:

We were not setting the recipient to "assistant" on tool responses
We were not mapping the tool_call_id to the proper function name on tool responses, resulting in the
